multipliers.reason: Multiple CD instances require coordinated deployment, load balancer configuration, and per-instance validation
6+ CD instances significantly increase deployment complexity and testing surface
SolrCloud requires ZooKeeper migration, ensemble setup, and cluster coordination
Custom indexes need schema review, config migration, and rebuild validation
Many custom indexes significantly increase migration and validation effort
Large xDB requires shard migration planning, potential downtime, and extended data validation
Very large xDB needs phased migration strategy, potential shard redistribution
Multi-site adds per-site validation overhead, per-site CDN config, and SSL per domain
Many sites significantly multiply validation and DNS cutover effort
Custom session providers need migration, Azure compatibility testing, and fallback planning
HA database requires Always On AG or MI Business Critical setup, failover testing
Large media libraries need staged transfer and extended cutover window
Very large media libraries may require multi-day transfer and phased sync strategy
VPN/ExpressRoute setup adds connectivity complexity, requires coordination with network team

multipliers.condition: networking_vpn_type == 'AWS Direct Connect' OR networking_vpn_type == 'Direct Connect + VPN backup'
multipliers.reason: Direct Connect (→ ExpressRoute on Azure) requires circuit provisioning, partner coordination, and peering setup
Compliance requirements add documentation, audit trails, and validation overhead
PCI DSS compliance requires specific network segmentation, encryption, and audit controls
Large content item counts increase serialization sync time, conflict resolution effort, and validation complexity
Multiple environments (dev/staging/UAT/prod) multiply infrastructure provisioning effort
Many Sitecore modules need individual migration validation and compatibility testing
SXA adds additional search indexes and rendering validation requirements
HIPAA requires encryption at rest/transit validation, access audit logging, BAA with Azure, PHI data handling procedures, and breach notification readiness
GDPR requires data residency validation, right-to-erasure support in xDB, DPA with Azure, and cross-border transfer assessment
Hub-spoke VNet topology requires hub VNet with Azure Firewall or NVA, spoke peering, UDR configuration, and centralized DNS forwarding
Active-active DR requires geo-replicated databases, Traffic Manager, synchronized deployments, and conflict resolution strategy
JSS/headless adds Node.js rendering host migration, SSR configuration, API endpoint validation, and separate build pipeline
5+ environments (dev/QA/staging/UAT/prod) significantly multiply infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, and pipeline complexity
Dedicated Publishing Service requires separate VM provisioning, connection string configuration, and publish queue validation
50-100K content items significantly increase migration duration, validation effort, and cutover window
100K+ content items require phased migration strategy, extended validation, and potentially multi-day cutover
4+ languages multiply content migration and validation effort per language version
9+ languages create significant complexity in content migration ordering, fallback chains, and per-language validation
16-30 custom pipeline processors require extensive code review, refactoring, and regression testing
30+ custom pipeline processors indicate a heavily customized Sitecore instance requiring comprehensive code migration
60-100 custom renderings increase frontend migration and visual regression testing effort
100+ renderings require systematic migration approach and extensive visual regression testing
Limited Sitecore experience increases ramp-up time, error rate, and review overhead for platform-specific migration tasks
Limited Azure experience adds learning overhead to infrastructure provisioning and configuration
Imminent deadlines compress testing cycles, force parallel work that increases coordination overhead, and reduce time for issue resolution
Incompatible modules require version upgrades, code changes, or replacement — each with its own testing cycle
Low code quality with no documentation or tests increases code analysis time and creates risk of undiscovered side effects during migration
